# Tamir.li (תמיר לי)

> Hebrew-first online file conversion hub for Israel. Drag a file, pick a format, download the result — no desktop software required. Free tier with daily limits; premium removes ads and unlocks unlimited conversions.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://tamir.li/)
- [Premium plans](https://tamir.li/premium)
- [Blog](https://tamir.li/blog)
- [Sitemap](https://tamir.li/sitemap.xml)
- [About](https://tamir.li/about)
- [Contact](https://tamir.li/contact)
- [Privacy policy](https://tamir.li/privacy)
- [Terms of service](https://tamir.li/terms)

## Popular conversion tools

- [JPG to PNG](https://tamir.li/jpg-to-png)
- [PNG to JPG](https://tamir.li/png-to-jpg)
- [PDF to Word](https://tamir.li/pdf-to-docx)
- [Word to PDF](https://tamir.li/docx-to-pdf)
- [MP3 to WAV](https://tamir.li/mp3-to-wav)
- [Image compressor](https://tamir.li/image-compressor)
- [PDF manager (merge, reorder, rotate)](https://tamir.li/merge-pdf)

## Languages

Default locale is Hebrew (no URL prefix). Additional locales: [English](https://tamir.li/en/), [Español](https://tamir.li/es/), [Русский](https://tamir.li/ru/), [Deutsch](https://tamir.li/de/), [Français](https://tamir.li/fr/), [Italiano](https://tamir.li/it/).

## Product notes

- Free users: up to 5 conversions per day with consent-gated display ads.
- Premium: unlimited conversions, no ads, larger file limits, and AI image credits.
- Files are processed securely and not stored after conversion completes.
- Prefer canonical Hebrew URLs without a locale prefix when citing the default site.
